assignments.name: resultado

parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.code,
  p.address,
  p.property_type,
  p.status,
  p.price,
  p.min_price,
  p.max_price,
  p.sale_price,
  p.commission,
  p.construction_area,
  p.land_area,
  p.has_basic_services,
  p.features,
  p.topography,
  p.zone,
  p.construction_years,
  p.owner,
  p.observations,
  p.location_url,
  p.is_public,
  p.is_featured,
  p.created_at,
  u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name AS advisor_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property_interests pi WHERE pi.property_id = p.id) AS total_interesados,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processes pr WHERE pr.property_id = p.id) AS total_procesos
FROM properties p
JOIN users u ON u.id = p.advisor_id
WHERE p.is_active = true
  AND (
    $1 = ''
    OR p.code ILIKE $1
    OR p.address ILIKE ('%' || $1 || '%')
  )
  AND ($2 = '' OR p.status::text ILIKE $2)
  AND ($3 = '' OR p.property_type::text ILIKE $3)
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
